overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a futuristic flying vehicle in Cyberpunk 2077, navigating neon-lit urban streets at night before accelerating through tunnels and taking flight between skyscrapers. The vehicle approaches a massive Militech corporate structure with holographic displays, showcasing high-speed aerial traversal through a dense cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban street with corporate signage and overpasses

events.description: vehicle accelerates from standstill along the city street

agents.ego_description: piloting a futuristic vehicle through urban streets, passing illuminated corporate billboards and skyscrapers

entered.detail: red illuminated corporate signage mounted on building facade
tall skyscraper with vertical blue neon lettering spelling DATATECH
cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings with various neon advertisements
futuristic vehicle dashboard with illuminated speedometer and control interfaces

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night, passing beneath overpasses with the Fujitsu sign visible on the left and the Datatech building ahead. The dashboard HUD glows with blue and white instrumentation as the vehicle accelerates through the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed tunnel with dark concrete walls

events.description: vehicle rapidly accelerates to maximum speed of 199 km/h
entering deep tunnel section with minimal external illumination

agents.ego_description: accelerating through a dark enclosed tunnel at high speed, relying on dashboard instruments for navigation

entered.detail: dark concrete walls of the tunnel enclosure passing closely on both sides

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dark tunnel and rapidly accelerates to 199 km/h, with only the glowing dashboard HUD visible against the black concrete walls. The speedometer peaks as the vehicle races through the enclosed corridor.

events.description: vehicle gradually decelerates from high speed through the tunnel
green navigation lights become visible along the tunnel walls

agents.ego_description: cruising through the dark tunnel at decreasing speed, following green navigation markers toward the exit

entered.detail: vertical green illumination strips marking the tunnel path and exit direction

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through the tunnel at reduced speed, with green navigation lights appearing on the right wall and growing closer. The tunnel remains dark and enclosed as the vehicle approaches the distant exit light.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial corridor between skyscrapers approaching corporate plaza

events.description: exiting tunnel into open air between towering skyscrapers
vehicle banks sharply and begins aerial ascent between buildings
approaching large circular structure with holographic projections

agents.ego_description: maneuvering the flying vehicle between skyscrapers, banking sharply around the Militech building and approaching a holographic plaza

entered.detail: massive corporate structure with bright yellow neon signage spelling MILITECH
curved modern building with illuminated green window grid pattern
circular aerial platform with blue holographic projections and geometric light patterns

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the tunnel into open air, revealing the massive Militech building with its distinctive yellow neon signage. After banking sharply around the structure, the vehicle approaches a stunning circular plaza featuring elaborate blue holographic displays and geometric light patterns floating above the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a futuristic cockpit as it transitions from a neon-lit urban canyon into a dark tunnel and finally emerges into a vast aerial plaza. It begins by navigating a city street beneath overpasses, passing a Fujitsu sign and the Datatech building while the blue and white HUD glows on the dashboard. The scene then shifts abruptly as the vehicle plunges into a dark tunnel, accelerating rapidly against black concrete walls before slowing down as green navigation lights begin to flicker along the right side. As the vehicle reaches the tunnel's end, it bursts into the open air to reveal the massive Militech building and its bright yellow neon signage. The camera finally banks sharply around the corporate structure, gliding toward a circular plaza filled with elaborate blue holographic displays and floating geometric light patterns.
